meta.note: 旧道具面板模板已重构为当前 5-设计/道具/3-生成 的多视图主体设计图模板；v1.2 强化主体不变量、功能视图、身份牌和漂移审查。

source.source_design_doc: projects/aigc/<项目名>/5-设计/道具/2-设计/<主体名称>.md
source.reference_image: projects/aigc/<项目名>/5-设计/道具/3-生成/<主体名称>-主图.png

output.output_image: projects/aigc/<项目名>/5-设计/道具/3-生成/<主体名称>-多视图.png
output.output_prompt_json: projects/aigc/<项目名>/5-设计/道具/3-生成/<主体名称>-多视图.json

reference_images: projects/aigc/<项目名>/5-设计/道具/3-生成/<主体名称>-主图.png

must_preserve: construction logic, joints, seams, hinges, seals or edges
material family, color, aging, dirt, wear and markings
may_vary: opened or closed state when implied by the design
neutral support surface or measurement cue
must_not_invent: a different object in each panel

reference_policy.reference_image_role: visual anchor for prop silhouette, proportion, material, wear and identifying details
do_not_copy: temporary support elements not present in the design

identity_badge.visual_style: small clean production badge, high contrast, secondary to the prop views
identity_badge.fallback: if exact text rendering fails, preserve a clean empty badge plate for post-production overlay and keep the full name in the JSON record

layout.sheet_intent: functional proof board for one prop identity, not a product advertisement or object lineup
layout.background: neutral dark warm gray production-board background

view_modules.description: Large main three-quarter view matching the reference image.
Front, side, back, and top or functional angle views, all showing the same prop identity.
Close-up cells for material, joints, wear, markings, moving parts, seals, edges, or functional affordance.
Non-human scale or usage cues such as table edge, tile size, measurement ticks, pedestal contact shadow, or opened/closed state.
Opened, closed, charged, dormant, damaged or assembled state only when the upstream design already implies that state.

view_plan.purpose: locks the canonical silhouette and strongest identifying details

view_plan.role: front, side, back and top or functional orthographic views
view_plan.purpose: proves the same volume, scale and part placement from controlled angles
shows material, joints, wear, markings, moving parts or edge construction
uses non-human measurement cues or design-implied state variants without adding a character

critical_requirements: Use the corresponding prop/subject design document's Prompt Design section as the primary source of truth.
Use the single-subject main image as the visual reference anchor for silhouette, proportions, materials, color, wear, and identifying details.
Apply the subject invariant lock before arranging views; every module must prove the same object identity.

Reserve one fixed top-left identity badge area and visibly attempt the short ASCII subject ID `<PROP_ID_ASCII_SAFE>`; if exact text rendering is unreliable, preserve the badge area for post-production overlay.
Create one prop multiview subject design sheet, not a poster, not a product advertisement, and not a collection of different objects.
All views must depict the same prop identity with stable morphology, scale logic, material aging, construction details, and narrative function.
Layout instructions organize views only; they must not override the upstream design document or redesign the prop.
No people, no hands, no dominant character figures, no unrelated scene takeover.
If exact text rendering is unreliable, reserve clean label areas for post-production overlay instead of hallucinating labels.

negative_drift_controls.identity_drift: do not change silhouette, proportions, functional part placement or material age between views
negative_drift_controls.function_drift: do not invent new mechanisms, markings, ornaments or supernatural functions
negative_drift_controls.scale_drift: use scale cues without hands, full people or character takeover
negative_drift_controls.layout_drift: do not turn the sheet into a luxury ad, lineup, poster, scene illustration or cluttered inventory board

review_focus: same prop silhouette and construction logic across all views
orthographic or functional views prove front, side, back and top or opened-state logic
detail callouts match source materials and wear
no human hand or character takeover
no invented extra parts, labels, symbols or unrelated scene facts
top-left identity badge has a visible short ID or a clean overlay-ready badge plate
prompt_payload.negative_prompt: different object in each view, character takeover, hands holding the prop, product lineup, luxury advertisement, unrelated poster scene, redesigned silhouette, invented ornaments, inconsistent material, extra parts not present in the source design
